category_sources: source_facts.description says record/playback videos and simple edits; official MJPEG Tools site documents MJPEG capture, editing, replay, and MPEG encoding tools.
display_name_sources: Official project site title is MJPEG Tools; source_facts.name is mjpegtools.
docs_sources: Official project site provides FAQ and howto links; official English MJPEG HOWTO PDF is linked from the project site.
repo_sources: Official MJPEG Tools page gives the SVN checkout URL for the complete repository; no newer official Git repository was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables include video conversion/encoding tools; official site describes MJPEG capture/editing/replay and MPEG encoding.
